pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17 semantics, failing to leverage JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not enforce bytecode compatibility with the target JDK version specified in the property, potentially leading to runtime issues on JDK 21 if older APIs are used or if the compiler defaults to a different source/target level.
